release_notes: Settings rebuilt with a left navigation (Model, Audio & Language, Vocabulary, Cloud & Prompting, Behavior, Hotkey) and a resizable window. Text replacements are now editable in Settings (one "misheard => correct" rule per line). The API key is masked with a reveal toggle, history entries have copy/delete on hover plus a Clear-all, and dark scrollbars and inputs replace the white OS controls. Accuracy: abbreviations like "e.g." survive punctuation cleanup, and cloud transcription retries once on transient errors. Hover the recording pill for the "esc cancels" hint.
